message:
fix: Add AVX-512 disable macros to build.zig libdeflate flags

- Add macros to both libdeflate_flags and libdeflate_flags_no_opt
- Previous commits only fixed incremental.zig (batch compilation)
- build.zig also compiles libdeflate for runtime module
- This is why CI was still failing - build.zig wasn't fixed

The CI errors were from build.zig compiling libdeflate (line 37-52)
without the preprocessor macros, while incremental.zig had them.
Both locations need the macros.
